name: pricepilot
description: CPG pricing intelligence — competitive benchmarks, category trends, and price positioning for consumer brands.
long_description:
PricePilot gives CPG brand managers instant access to competitive pricing benchmarks powered by real Amazon marketplace data. Compare your products against category averages, track pricing trends, and understand your price position — all through natural conversation with Claude.

Designed for brands doing $1M-$50M in revenue who are priced out of NielsenIQ and enterprise analytics.

tools.name: get_price_position
tools.description: Get competitive price positioning for a product against category benchmarks

tools.name: get_category_trend
tools.description: Get pricing trend data for a product category over time

tools.name: get_category_overview
tools.description: Get a summary overview of a product category including key metrics

tools.name: compare_products
tools.description: Compare pricing data across multiple products in a category

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all available product categories with metadata

tools.name: server_status
tools.description: Check PricePilot server health and available data
